'''Sale Mardec''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]].

She lived in [[Jalor City]] with her parents [[Riic Mardec|Riic]] and [[Lina Mardec|Lina]], and a sister [[Fora Mardec|Fora]].

Unfortunately, on [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the Mardecs (except for Riic) died in a crossfire when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] attacked a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell. The "collateral damage" could have happened due to Rebel or Imperial fire.
